    Calculates position for entities

    Calculates position for blocks on screen

    Calculates the player's velocity based on movement direction and inertia.
    camera - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
     
    Camera - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Camera class is used to follow an entity and keep the screen centered around it.
    Camera(double, double) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Camera
    Constructs a Camera with a specified position.
    Camera(Entity) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Camera
    Constructs a Camera that follows the specified entity.
    changeSelectedWeapon(Weapon) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Player
     
    changeSelectedWeaponBox(int) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.HudManager
    Changes the fill color of the selected weapon box.
    checkIfAllImageViewsAreAdded() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Game
    Ensures that each entity's image view is added to the viewer list.
    checkInteractionKey() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
    Checks if the interaction key is pressed and triggers interaction if applicable.
    checkIntersectionWithBlocks(Level) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
    Checks for intersections with wall blocks in the level and populates the collision set.
    checkIntersectionWithEntities(ArrayList<Entity>) - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Entity
    Checks for intersections with other entities and adds any detected collisions to the collision set.
    checkKeyPressed() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
    Checks for weapon selection key presses and triggers the corresponding weapon box selection.
    checkMousePressed() - Method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.UserInputHandler
    Checks mouse button states and triggers corresponding actions such as shooting or dropping a weapon.
    Chest - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Chest class represents an interactable container that can store items.
    Chest(double, double) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Chest
    Constructs a new Chest at the specified position.
    Chunk - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.chunks
    The Chunk class is used to store info about chunk.
    Chunk(String, int, int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.chunks.Chunk
    Constructs a new chunk instance using the provided parameters.
    CHUNK_EXTERNAL_PATH - Static variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.ChunkManager

    ChunkManager - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    ChunkManager is responsible for managing chunks in the game.
    ChunkManager(BlockManager) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.ChunkManager
    Constructs a new ChunkManager, loading chunks from both internal resources and the external folder.
    ChunkManager.ChunkCharacteristics - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    ChunkCharacteristics holds details about each chunk.
    ChunkManager.ChunkTags - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers
    Chunks tags
    chunkTags - Variable in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.managers.ChunkManager.ChunkCharacteristics

    Constructs a ChunkToPlace with specified coordinates and door configuration.

    Clears the HUD by making all HUD elements invisible.

    Collision - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
    The Collision class represents a collision boundary used to detect interactions between entities, blocks, or other unmovable objects.
    Collision(double, double, double, double, Collision.CollisionType) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Collision
    Constructs a Collision instance for blocks with the given parameters.
    Collision(double, double, double, double, Collision.CollisionType, Entity) - Constructor for class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities.Collision
    Constructs a Collision instance for entities with an associated Entity.
    Collision.CollisionType - Enum Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv.entities
